name: node-restart-smoke-profiles
description: Repo-local restart smoke profiles for clean, dirty, and partial-state restart validation.

pre_restart_writes: persist representative metadata such as settings/mappings/aliases
post_restart_reads: verify runtime can serve traffic again
continuity_assertions: node can re-bind and become ready without state loss

post_restart_reads: read seeded documents after crash restart
verify metadata continuity after crash replay
verify runtime readiness after abrupt stop
continuity_assertions: crash restart does not silently drop committed state
runtime can recover persisted state without corruption
post-crash startup still reaches ready state

state_mutation: remove derived or cache-like state only
preserve authoritative state needed for restart
post_restart_reads: read documents after restart from partial state
verify authoritative metadata is rebuilt or replayed correctly
verify runtime readiness after partial-state recovery
continuity_assertions: partial derived-state loss does not corrupt authoritative state
runtime rebuilds or replays missing derived state
restart still reaches ready state with bounded recovery behavior
